name: Mercedes-Benz EQS
description: The Mercedes EQS is a luxury electric vehicle that was released in 2021. It is known for its high-end features like rear seat entertainment screens, adaptive cruise control, lane keeping assistance, self driving, and an advanced sound system. The EQS is available in several models ranging from standard to AMG with multiple powertrains. With an all-electric range of 350-640 km per charge, the EQS is a powerful and efficient premium electric car by Mercedes-Benz.
creator: Sweeto29314
